mapper.insert: insert into account(open_id, homepage_id, password, name, email, mphone, phone, company, provider_id) values(#{openId},#{homepageId},#{password},#{name},#{email},#{mphone},#{phone},#{company},#{provider.providerId})
mapper.select: select count(*) as cnt from account where open_id=#{openId}
select count(*) as cnt from account where homepage_id=#{homepageId}
SELECT open_id FROM account WHERE email = #{email} AND password IS NOT NULL ORDER BY account_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT open_id FROM account WHERE mphone = #{phone} AND password IS NOT NULL ORDER BY account_id DESC LIMIT 1
select count(*) as cnt from account where open_id=#{openId} and email=#{email}
mapper.update: update account set password = #{idOrPass} where open_id=#{openId}
UPDATE account SET email = #{email} WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND (email IS NULL OR email = '')
UPDATE account SET password = #{password} WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
